text.div:
This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include these codes as defined in http://snomed.info/sct
    CodeDisplay
    228793007Planning target volume (observable entity)
    228791009Gross tumor volume (observable entity)
    228792002Clinical target volume (observable entity)
  • Include these codes as defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/CodeSystem/snomed-requested-cs
    CodeDisplayDefinition
    1162586008Irradiated volume of organ at risk (observable entity)
    USCRS-33520Internal Target VolumeClinical tumor volume with an internal margin to compensate for all movements
    USCRS-33521Internal Gross Tumor VolumeGross tumor volume with an internal margin to compensate for all movements

name: RadiotherapyVolumeTypeVS
title: Radiotherapy Volume Type Value Set
description: Codes describing the types of body volumes used in radiotherapy planning and treatment. The value set includes the most common codes from DICOM CID 9534 Radiotherapy Targets (UID 1.2.840.10008.6.1.1244) and adds a code for Organs at Risk (OAR).
copyright: This value set includes content from SNOMED CT, which is copyright © 2002+ International Health Terminology Standards Development Organisation (IHTSDO), and distributed by agreement between IHTSDO and HL7. Implementer use of SNOMED CT is not covered by this agreement
